tasks.label: archive-old-native-project
args: $root='c:/Users/asus/Desktop/AqariSyria'; $backup=Join-Path $root 'old_project_backup'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $backup | Out-Null; $items=@('app','build.gradle','database.rules.json','firebase.json','firestore.rules','firestore_rules_copy.txt','get_logs.ps1','gradle','gradle.properties','gradlew','gradlew.bat','settings.gradle','storage.rules'); foreach ($item in $items) { $path=Join-Path $root $item; if (Test-Path $path) { Move-Item -LiteralPath $path -Destination $backup -Force } }; Write-Host 'Archived old project files.'; Get-ChildItem $root | Select-Object Name

tasks.label: backup-and-remove-old-native-files
